did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Johnson Graduate School of Management Library records,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: Johnson Graduate School of Management (Cornell University).Library.

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, minutes of meetings, photographs, and files.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, reports, minutes of meetings, photographs, and files on the activities and administration of the library.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1985, the Graduate School of Business and Public Administration changed its name to the Johnson Graduate School of Management.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, reports, minutes of meetings, photographs, and files on the activities and administration of the library.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Johnson Graduate School of Management (Cornell University).

did.unittitle: Graduate School of Business and Public Administration Library Records
Graduate School of Business and Public Administration Library Records
Johnson Graduate School of Management Library Records
Johnson Graduate School of Management Library Records
Johnson Graduate School of Management Library Records-includes reports, publications, collection notes, publicity, memos and staff lists
Johnson Graduate School of Management Library Records-includes reports, publications, collection notes, publicity, memos and staff lists
Johnson Graduate School of Management Library Records-includes reports, publications, collection notes, publicity, memos and staff lists
Photos of staff of the Library and the Graduate School of Business and Public Administration; Eastwick Library, including flood photos
Brochure publicizing first optical disk cataloged, Malott Hall dedication program, Sage Hall information, facebook booklet

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Johnson Graduate School of Management Library records, #26-7-3209. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
